Um, a key function of ours, of course, is leading
and coordinating work across the sector to monitor
and improve the quality and safety of services.
Uh, we've got a legislative mandate as a voice for consumers
and we hold significant expertise with data information
and use that to understand what's happening in the
system and how to improve it.
What we see and say is informed not just by system data,
but also from patients themselves.
And we think that's pretty important.
Um, and when we see issues, we act quickly to escalate these
'cause of course, we're a couple of steps
removed from the front line.
We can't necessarily do it ourselves.
As with many organizations,
we've undergone significant change in recent years to ensure
that we can deliver in our priorities within our resourcing.
Healthcare. Acquired harm can
and does have serious consequences.
Oh yeah. So avoiding these harms, of course, leads
to longer, healthier lives

We have to work really closely with other agencies

And we're constantly trying to be better at showing not just

it's hard, difficult to clearly identify sometimes

I'm not saying that's not one of them,
it's one that we need to consider.
Um, and certainly we need to be very aware, I think
of the changing demands on the system with this, you know,
big cohort of some of us going through
and all gonna hit 80 at
around the same time in a few years. Mm-hmm.
Thank you. Hey, thank you very much
for making stuff available for an hour today.
It's great. Appreciate it. You have a good day.
Thank you team. We are suspended until.
